options.systemMessage:
Extract vehicle search details from the user message and return ONLY a JSON object with these fields (omit any field not mentioned):
{
  "category": "suvs | cars | vans | motorcycles | lorries | buses | tractors",
  "brand": "toyota | honda | nissan | etc",
  "model": "prado | axio | vezel | etc",
  "location": "city name if mentioned",
  "year_min": number,
  "year_max": number,
  "fuel_type": "diesel | petrol | hybrid | electric",
  "min_price": number in LKR,
  "max_price": number in LKR,
  "max_mileage": number in km,
  "condition": "brand-new | used"
}

Important conversions:
- "under 35 million" → max_price: 35000000
- "under 50000 miles" → max_mileage: 50000  
- "brand new" → condition: "brand-new"
- "2016 to 2020" → year_min: 2016, year_max: 2020


Important - do not use any tools and Output ONLY the JSON object. Do not include conversational text, markdown formatting like ```json, or comments within the JSON

parameters.text: ❌ I couldn't find any vehicles matching those specific details on Riyasewana right now. Try a broader price range!"

options.systemMessage:
Return ONLY a raw JSON object. No explanation, no markdown, no code blocks.

Extract vehicle search details and return slugs for ikman.lk URL format:

{
  "category": "cars | vans | motorbikes-scooters | lorries | buses | three-wheelers",
  "brand": "toyota | honda | bmw | mitsubishi | lexus | suzuki | mazda | 
            kia | hyundai | nissan | mercedes-benz",
  "model": "exact ikman slug from mapping below",
  "location": "city name if mentioned",
  "year_min": number,
  "year_max": number,
  "fuel_type": "diesel | petrol | hybrid | electric",
  "min_price": number in LKR,
  "max_price": number in LKR,
  "max_mileage": number in km,
  "condition": "brand-new | used"
}

ikman model slug mapping:

TOYOTA: prado → land-cruiser-prado | axio → axio | raize → raize | 
vitz → vitz | aqua → aqua | hilux → hilux | roomy → roomy | 
fortuner → fortuner | harrier → harrier | chr → chr | 
land cruiser → land-cruiser | surf → hilux-surf | 
hiace/kdh → hiace | corolla → corolla | allion → allion | 
premio → premio | yaris → yaris | voxy → voxy | noah → noah

HONDA: vezel → vezel | crv → crv | civic → civic | fit → fit | 
city → city | freed → freed | nbox → n-box | 
fit shuttle → fit-shuttle | grace → grace | zrv → zrv-z

BMW: x1 → x1 | x5 → x5 | 318i → 318i | 520d → 520d | 
523i → 523i | 218i → 218i | 220i → 220i | 
530e → 530e | 525i → 525i | 740le → 740le

MITSUBISHI: lancer → lancer | montero → montero | 
outlander → outlander | pajero → pajero | 
attrage → attrage | xpander → xpander | 
ek wagon → ek-wagon | eclipse cross → eclipse-cross | l200 → l200

LEXUS: lx600 → lx600 | gx550 → gx550 | rx350 → rx350 | 
rx450h → rz450h | lbx → lbx | lm500h → lm500h | 
hs250h → hs250h | ls500h → ls500h | ls600h → ls600h

SUZUKI: wagon r → wagonr | alto → alto | swift → swift | 
spacia → spacia | fronx → fronx | hustler → hustler | 
celerio → celerio | stingray → wagonr-stingray | 
wagon r fx → wagonr-fx | jimny → jimny

MAZDA: familia → familia | mazda 3 → 3 | demio → demio | 
axela → axela | cx-5 → cx-5 | mazda 6 → 6 | 
carol → carol | flair → flair | tribute → tribute

KIA: sonet → sonet | seltos → seltos | sportage → sportage | 
sorento → sorento | picanto → picanto | rio → rio | 
stonic → stonic | carens → carens | syros → syros

HYUNDAI: venue → venue | tucson → tucson | santa fe → santa-fe | 
elantra → elantra | accent → accent | sonata → sonata | 
eon → eon | matrix → matrix | alcazar → alcazar

NISSAN: sunny → sunny | x-trail → x-trail | dayz → dayz | 
leaf → leaf | march → march | almera → almera | 
roox → roox | bluebird → bluebird | magnite → magnite | 
sylphy → sylphy | serena → serena

MERCEDES-BENZ: c200 → c200 | c180 → c180 | e200 → e200 | 
e300 → e300 | e350 → e350 | glb → glb | 
cla180 → cla-180 | cla200 → cla-200 | 
a180 → a180 | s400 → s400

Conversions:
- "under 35 million" → max_price: 35000000
- "under 50000 km/miles" → max_mileage: 50000
- "brand new" / "unregistered" → condition: "brand-new"
- "used" / "second hand" / "registered" → condition: "used"

important do no use any tools
